notes: Level 7 manual review override shard for spell indexes 05-09 in generated discovery row order.
This packet normalized Dream of the Blue Veil JSON formatting while preserving data and adding missing mechanics for transport, unconsciousness, and cancellation rules.

draconic-transformation::attack_or_save_.issue: The Dexterity save and half-damage breath weapon are represented by the DAMAGE effect; this entry is closed because the save mechanic is no longer only prose.

draconic-transformation::sustain_or_reca.issue: The bonus-action repeat breath weapon is represented by the DAMAGE trigger/sustain cost and utility granted action; this entry is closed because the repeat action is no longer only prose.
draconic-transformation::sustain_or_reca.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional sustain field required for this pass.
draconic-transformation::sustain_or_reca.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE trigger and UTILITY grantedActions.

draconic-transformation::movement_or_rep.issue: The 60-foot flying speed is represented by a MOVEMENT speed-change effect and utility option; this entry is closed because movement is no longer flattened into description only.
draconic-transformation::movement_or_rep.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional movement field required for this pass.
draconic-transformation::movement_or_rep.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT speedChange and UTILITY controlOptions.

draconic-transformation::forced_movement.issue: The detector matched breath/wings language, but the spell grants the caster flight and an exhaled cone; it does not force another creature to move.
draconic-transformation::forced_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Track the true mechanic under movement_or_repositioning.

draconic-transformation::vision_light_so.issue: Blindsight, seeing while blinded or in darkness, invisible-creature visibility, hiding exception, and total-cover exception are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class sense/visibility exception fields.
draconic-transformation::vision_light_so.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sense grant and visibility exception fields for blindsight, invisible creatures, hidden creatures, darkness, blindness, and total cover.
draconic-transformation::vision_light_so.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime senseGrant or perceptionMode data instead of relying only on UTILITY controlOptions.

draconic-transformation::status_or_state.issue: The transformation into draconic features is represented by utility options plus movement/damage effects, but runtime lacks a first-class transformation/state-change payload for feature bundles.
draconic-transformation::status_or_state.recommendedTemplateChange: Add transformation feature bundle fields when the transformation bucket is propagated.
draconic-transformation::status_or_state.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime transformationFeatureBundle data for spells that grant bundled temporary form features.

draconic-transformation::conditional_end.issue: The detector matched normal duration language ('until the spell ends'); the benefits are already bounded by timed concentration duration and effect durations.
draconic-transformation::conditional_end.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by duration and effect durations.

dream-of-the-blue-veil::forced_movement.issue: The detector matched the blue-curtain pull/transport prose, but the mechanic is planar-world transport rather than forced movement by push/pull.

dream-of-the-blue-veil::travel_or_planar.issue: The full-duration interworld transport, destination constraints, and origin anchors are represented by MOVEMENT and utility options; this entry is closed because travel is no longer only prose.
dream-of-the-blue-veil::travel_or_planar.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional travel field required for this pass.
dream-of-the-blue-veil::travel_or_planar.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT effect and UTILITY controlOptions.

dream-of-the-blue-veil::social_or_knowle.issue: The requirement that the caster be aware of the destination world's existence is represented in utility options; this entry is closed because the knowledge prerequisite is no longer hidden only in prose.
dream-of-the-blue-veil::social_or_knowle.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional knowledge prerequisite field required for this pass.

dream-of-the-blue-veil::status_or_state_.issue: Affected creatures falling unconscious is represented as a STATUS_CONDITION effect with break triggers; this entry is closed because the state change is now structured.

dream-of-the-blue-veil::conditional_endi.issue: Target-damage exclusion and caster-damage group cancellation are preserved in status aftermath and utility options, but runtime lacks first-class per-target cancellation versus caster-wide cancellation fields.
dream-of-the-blue-veil::conditional_endi.recommendedTemplateChange: Add per-target and caster-wide cancellation fields for long-duration transport/setup spells.
dream-of-the-blue-veil::conditional_endi.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime cancellationRules data instead of relying only on statusCondition.aftermath/controlOptions.

etherealness::target_filter_or_eligibili.issue: Ethereal-only interaction limits and higher-level willing-creature eligibility are preserved in utility/scaling prose, but runtime lacks first-class planar interaction filters and scaled target eligibility.
etherealness::target_filter_or_eligibili.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar interaction filter fields and scaled willing-target eligibility fields.
etherealness::target_filter_or_eligibili.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarInteractionFilter and scaledTargetEligibility data.

etherealness::vision_light_sound.issue: The 60-foot gray perception limit into the origin plane is preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class cross-plane perception range/appearance fields.
etherealness::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add cross-plane perception range and appearance fields.

etherealness::sensor_or_remote_perceptio.issue: The origin-plane perception rule is represented as utility options, but runtime lacks a typed perception/sensor payload for range-limited plane overlap sight.
etherealness::sensor_or_remote_perceptio.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sensor/perception fields for plane-overlap sight.

etherealness::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Entry into the Border Ethereal and return to the origin plane are represented by MOVEMENT plus utility options; this entry is closed because the travel mechanic is no longer only prose.
etherealness::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional travel field required for this pass.
etherealness::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT and UTILITY effects.

etherealness::resource_or_consumption.issue: Moving up or down costs an extra foot per foot moved; this is preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class alternate movement-cost fields.
etherealness::resource_or_consumption.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement cost multiplier fields for directional or terrain-like movement costs.

etherealness::conditional_ending.issue: Return on spell end, occupied-space shunting, and invalid-plane instant ending are represented in movement, damage, and utility options; this entry is closed because the end behavior is no longer only prose.
etherealness::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional conditional-ending field required for this pass.
etherealness::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT, DAMAGE, and UTILITY effects.

etherealness::aftermath_or_memory.issue: The detector matched higher-level targeting prose, not an aftermath or memory mechanic.

finger-of-death::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Constitution save and half-damage outcome are represented by the DAMAGE effect; this entry is closed because the save mechanic is already structured.

finger-of-death::target_filter_or_eligib.issue: The base spell can target a creature, but only a Humanoid killed by the spell rises as a Zombie; runtime stores this in summon/utility target filters while the allowed condition enum cannot express target killed by spell.
finger-of-death::target_filter_or_eligib.recommendedTemplateChange: Add death-triggered target filter fields for conditional riders.
finger-of-death::target_filter_or_eligib.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime deathTriggeredRider data keyed to creature type and cause of death.

finger-of-death::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched 'a creature you can see'; this is ordinary line-of-sight targeting and is already represented.

finger-of-death::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: The zombie creation is a death-triggered rider, not a ward/alarm, and runtime currently approximates it with after_primary because the trigger enum cannot express 'target killed by this spell at start of your next turn'.
finger-of-death::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetDeathTrigger with delayed start-of-next-turn timing.

fire-storm::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Dexterity save and half-damage outcome are represented by the DAMAGE effect.

fire-storm::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: Flammable objects that are not worn or carried start burning; valid targets now include objects and utility/terrain effects preserve the rule, but runtime lacks object flammability and worn/carried exclusion filters.
fire-storm::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object flammability plus worn/carried exclusion fields.

fire-storm::environmental_change.issue: Starting unworn, uncarried flammable objects burning is represented as TERRAIN/UTILITY data, but runtime lacks first-class object ignition state-change fields.
